sub_modules.fir_coeff_bank: Combinational ROM-style bank containing the exact 51 unique Q15 coefficients for the symmetric 101-tap FIR.
sub_modules.fir_symmetric_preadd: Combinational mirror-tap pre-adder that forms paired sample sums and forwards the center sample.
sub_modules.fir_parallel_mac: Combinational signed multiply-accumulate engine using paired sums, center sample, and Q15 coefficients into a signed 64-bit accumulator.
sub_modules.fir_q15_normalize: Combinational output normalizer that applies the required arithmetic right shift by 15 and truncates to the configured output width.
